examples: She lifted the barbell in her left hand.
Should he or she elect to wear a belly button ring or a barbell?
He strained and raised the barbell of 205 kilograms.
Players sprint, jump, catch, throw and furiously bench-press a 225-pound barbell until their upper body exhausts.
Mounted on a thick steel axle, they formed a barbell that weighed three hundred and sixty-seven pounds.
